elements.original_description: A white sheet of paper with three short bullet points written in black ink, placed at a slight angle on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A white sheet of paper with three short bullet points written in black ink, placed at a slight angle on a pure white background. Professional 2D minimalist icon, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp edges, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks visible, simple and clear visual statement.
